notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Buttons manager remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.16.
Gift/lead-magnet delivery and cleanup logic remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.18.
Admin UI now presents the section as Lead Magnets: 'Подарки' -> 'Лид-магниты'.
This build is presentation naming only: internal routes remain gifts:* and DB fields remain gift_* / gifts_* for compatibility.
No new lead-magnet conditions are enabled yet; access logic remains current safe modes: access for all / subscribers mode already stored as giftsRequireSubscription.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
Audit: this is a small controlled naming layer over 7.5.18. Next safe step is adding lead-magnet condition schema; later merge admin flow wrappers into one clean core module.
